# awesome-ai-api (full dump for LLMs)

> Full, machine-readable leaderboard of AI API gateways, formatted for LLM ingestion.
> Snapshot: 2026-05-19 14:07 SGT. Total: 203. API-confirmed: 98.
> Canonical site: https://mackding.github.io/awesome-ai-api/
> Source repo: https://github.com/MackDing/awesome-ai-api
> License: MIT (code) + CC0 (data)

## Top 50 Gateways (sorted by score)

1. api.vveai.com — https://api.vveai.com — score 9.9, API verified, region cn, engine unknown, latency 214ms, uptime 100.0% over 27 samples, models: claude, gpt, gemini, chatgpt, openai, deepseek
2. PackyAPI (PackyCode) — https://www.packyapi.com — score 9.9, API verified, region cn, engine unknown, latency 226ms, uptime 100.0% over 27 samples, models: claude, gpt, gemini, openai
